---
title: "cqrs()"
description: "Create a graph-visible CQRS bundle. Command dispatch is only DATA on the returned `command` node; all derived facts flow through declared graph deps."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create a graph-visible CQRS bundle. Command dispatch is only DATA on the
returned `command` node; all derived facts flow through declared graph deps.

## Import

```ts
import { cqrs } from "@graphrefly/ts/cqrs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function cqrs(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: CqrsOptions<TCommand, TEvent> = {},
): CqrsBundle<TCommand, TEvent>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `opts` | `CqrsOptions<TCommand, TEvent>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `CqrsBundle<TCommand, TEvent>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { cqrs } from "@graphrefly/ts/cqrs";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/cqrs/index.ts`
